desc: Delivered automation solutions for enterprise web, mobile, and API platforms using Playwright, Cypress, Pytest, Detox, and K6. Built reusable test frameworks, CI/CD integrations, and parallel execution strategies that improved maintainability, reduced runtime by over 50%, and supported large-scale automated testing initiatives. Developed Python tooling, mentored engineers, and served as a technical liaison for client engagements.

Performed manual and exploratory testing, authored structured test cases, and collaborated with development teams to identify quality risks and automation opportunities. Supported defect investigation and validation efforts across multiple client projects while contributing to process improvements and testing standards.

Designed and developed full-stack web applications using React, Astro, Hono, htmx, TypeScript, and Cloudflare services. Built edge-hosted applications with Cloudflare D1, implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, and delivered production websites focused on performance, maintainability, and scalable architecture.
